import { PlusIcon } from 'lucide-react' import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar' import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu' import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip' type Profile = { name: string src: string } const avatars: readonly Profile[] = [ { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=12', name: 'Leo Grant' }, { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=28', name: 'Nina Alvarez' }, { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=36', name: 'Amara Lewis' }, { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=41', name: 'Jade Morris' }, { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=47', name: 'Elena Park' }, { src: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/160?img=52', name: 'Noah Bennett' } ] as const const getInitials = (name: string) => name .split(/\s+/) .map((word) => word.slice(0, 1)) .join('') const Avatar19 = () => { return (
{avatars.slice(0, 3).map((avatar) => ( {getInitials(avatar.name)} {avatar.name} ))} Add More people {avatars.slice(3).map((avatar) => ( {getInitials(avatar.name)} {avatar.name} ))}
) } export default Avatar19
